note: docsystem contains first-party Factory tooling (.factory/, tools/) and a checkout of the upstream vmware/photon repo under docsystem/photon/ which is used as input content. The latter is untracked. Snyk scanned everything; only first-party findings were considered for patching in iter 1. The long tail (>30) is deferred per the project plan.

accepted.reason: Swapped to defusedxml.ElementTree with a stdlib fallback.

Added validate_refname() (regex ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._/-]*$) that rejects branch names starting with '-' or containing shell metacharacters. Called at the top of every loop iteration before any git command is run. Snyk still flags the call site because it does not recognize the validator; runtime defence is in place.
validate_refname applied to commit_hash on each iteration.
Same fix applied to the docs-blogger copy of the importer.
Inside docsystem/photon, a vendored checkout of github.com/vmware/photon. Untracked in our repo.
Hugo front-matter pre-commit hook. project_dir comes from FACTORY_PROJECT_DIR env var set by the Factory tooling; operator-supplied by contract.
Factory skill driven by argparse / env config; paths point at the local SQLite db and Hugo content tree under operator's PHOTON_DOCS_DIR.
Same; this is the docs-blogger copy of the summarizer.
CLI tool for mirroring a git repository to a local cache; --output is operator-supplied.
Documentation lecturer plugin reads/writes under its plugin data directory, configured via env vars / argparse.

deferred.rationale: Remaining 73 findings live in docsystem/photon/ which is an untracked vendored checkout of github.com/vmware/photon, plus a small first-party tail in tools/ and .factory/ that follows the same env-var/CLI design contract documented above. The user has explicitly carved out a separate budget for the docsystem subdir per the project plan; one iteration was performed and the long tail is deferred.
issue_ids: 13 first-party python/PT in .factory/ + tools/ -- documented as DESIGN-DECISION above
deferred.next_iteration_recommendation: Decide whether docsystem/photon should be added to a Snyk path-ignore list (it is upstream code, scanned only because docsystem ships content generated from it). Adding photon/ to .snyk excludes would drop ~73 findings without any code change.
